title: Needham lifts Hut 8 target to $145 after second Beacon Point AI lease
excerpt: The new 352 MW agreement doubles contracted capacity at the Texas campus, prompting higher 2028 revenue and adjusted EBITDA forecasts as Hut 8 expands beyond...
content_html:
Hut 8 Corp. (NASDAQ: HUT) secured a second 352 MW AI data-center lease at its Beacon Point campus, prompting Needham to raise its price target to $145 from $128 while reiterating its Buy rating.

The 15-year agreement doubles the undisclosed investment-grade tenant's capacity at the Nueces County, Texas, campus to 704 MW of critical IT load. Needham analyst John Todaro said the leases offer among the strongest colocation economics signed in 2026.

Hut 8 shares closed at $100.93 on July 20, up 10.37% for the session. Needham's previous reference price was $91.45 as of July 17.

The second Beacon Point lease carries a $9.8 billion base-term contract value and substantially matches the first phase's terms. Both are triple-net leases with annual base-rent increases of 3%.

Together, the agreements give Beacon Point a base-term contract value of $19.6 billion. Hut 8 expects average annual net operating income of approximately $1.31 billion once both phases stabilize, equal to roughly $1.86 million per contracted IT megawatt.

The campus has 1,000 MW of utility capacity under an AEP Texas interconnection agreement. Its two leases cover 704 MW of IT capacity, with the difference reflecting the power required for supporting infrastructure. Initial campus energization is still planned for the first quarter of 2027, while Phase 2 data-hall delivery is expected to begin in the second quarter of 2028.

"The real test of our power-first approach is what our partners are willing to commit against it," Hut 8 CEO Asher Genoot said. "Our tenant at Beacon Point chose to double its footprint at the site, the strongest validation an asset can receive."

Needham raises 2028 estimates

Needham increased its calendar 2028 revenue forecast to $1.70 billion from $1.44 billion. Its adjusted EBITDA estimate rose to $1.32 billion from $1.07 billion, while its 2026 and 2027 forecasts remained unchanged.

The analyst's model assumes Phase 2 contributes 140 MW during 2028 as capacity ramps. Needham estimates construction will cost approximately $3.5 billion, based on capital spending of $9 million to $11 million per critical megawatt, with about 85% financed through additional debt.

Needham based its $145 target on 19 times discounted 2028 enterprise value to adjusted EBITDA. The firm identified construction delays, cost overruns and weaker bitcoin prices as risks to its valuation.

The new agreement raises Hut 8's contracted AI portfolio to 949 MW across Beacon Point and the 245 MW River Bend campus in Louisiana. Those leases carry combined base-term contract value of $26.6 billion and expected average annual NOI above $1.75 billion once stabilized.

Needham disclosed that Hut 8 received investment banking services from the firm during the preceding 12 months and that the firm makes a market in Hut 8 shares.

Hut 8 expects average annual net operating income of approximately $1.31 billion once both phases stabilize, equal to roughly $1.86 million per contracted IT megawatt. Needham estimates construction will cost approximately $3.5 billion, based on capital spending of $9 million to $11 million per critical megawatt, with about 85% financed through additional debt. content_html_zh:
Hut 8 Corp.（纳斯达克股票代码：HUT）在其 Beacon Point 园区获得了第二个 352 MW 人工智能数据中心的租赁权，促使 Needham 将其目标价格从 128 美元上调至 145 美元，同时重申其买入评级。

这项为期 15 年的协议将德克萨斯州纽西斯县园区未公开的投资级租户容量增加了一倍，达到 704 兆瓦的关键 IT 负载。 Needham 分析师 John Todaro 表示，这些租赁报价是 2026 年签署的最强劲的托管经济效益之一。

Hut 8股价7月20日收于100.93美元，盘中上涨10.37%。 截至 7 月 17 日，Needham 之前的参考价格为 91.45 美元。

第二个 Beacon Point 租赁合同的基本合同价值为 98 亿美元，与第一阶段的条款基本一致。 两者都是三重净租赁，每年基本租金上涨 3%。

这些协议总共为 Beacon Point 带来了 196 亿美元的基本合同价值。 Hut 8 预计，一旦两个阶段稳定下来，平均年净营业收入约为 13.1 亿美元，相当于每合同 IT 兆瓦约 186 万美元。

根据德克萨斯州 AEP 互连协议，该园区拥有 1,000 兆瓦的公用设施容量。 其两项租赁涵盖 704 MW 的 IT 容量，差异反映了支持基础设施所需的电力。 初始校园通电仍计划于 2027 年第一季度进行，而第二阶段数据大厅交付预计于 2028 年第二季度开始。

Hut 8 首席执行官 Asher Genoot 表示：“对我们权力优先方法的真正考验是我们的合作伙伴愿意做出什么承诺。” “我们 Beacon Point 的租户选择将其占地面积增加一倍，这是资产可以获得的最强有力的验证。”

李约瑟上调了 2028 年的预测

Needham 将 2028 年收入预测从 14.4 亿美元上调至 17 亿美元。 其调整后的 EBITDA 预期从 10.7 亿美元升至 13.2 亿美元，而 2026 年和 2027 年的预测保持不变。

分析师的模型假设随着容量的增加，2028 年第二阶段将贡献 140 兆瓦的电力。 Needham 估计，根据每临界兆瓦 900 万至 1100 万美元的资本支出，建设成本约为 35 亿美元，其中约 85% 通过额外债务融资。

Needham 的 145 美元目标是基于 2028 年企业价值贴现率的 19 倍调整后 EBITDA 得出的。 该公司认为施工延误、成本超支和比特币价格疲软对其估值构成风险。

新协议将 Hut 8 的 Beacon Point 和路易斯安那州 River Bend 园区的合同人工智能产品组合提高到 949 兆瓦。 这些租赁的基本期限合同总价值为 266 亿美元，一旦稳定，预计年平均 NOI 将超过 17.5 亿美元。

Needham 透露，Hut 8 在过去 12 个月内接受了该公司的投资银行服务，并且该公司在 Hut 8 股票上做市。
